articles.aiSummary:
Computational drug discovery involves complex workflows requiring the orchestration of dozens of specialized tools for drug molecule screening and optimization, but current AI agents struggle to maintain consistent performance in these high-complexity scenarios. Researchers developed MolClaw, an autonomous agent designed to perform drug molecule evaluation, screening, and optimization automatically. MolClaw integrates over 30 specialized domain resources through a three-tier hierarchical skill architecture comprising 70 total skills, enabling effective management of intricate drug development workflows. This hierarchical structure significantly enhances the performance consistency and reliability of the AI agent compared to existing approaches. The research demonstrates that this architectural innovation can substantially improve the efficiency of computational drug discovery. However, validation in real clinical settings and further research on diverse molecular types remains necessary.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
신약 개발 과정에서 분자 평가, 스크리닝, 최적화 같은 복잡한 작업들은 수십 개의 전문 도구를 단계별로 활용해야 하는데, 기존 AI 에이전트들은 이러한 고복잡도 작업에서 성능 저하 문제를 겪었다. 연구팀은 이를 해결하기 위해 MolClaw라는 자동 AI 에이전트를 개발했다. MolClaw는 30개 이상의 전문 도메인 자원을 3단계 계층적 기술 아키텍처(총 70개 기술)로 통합하여, 약물 분자의 평가와 스크리닝, 최적화를 자동으로 수행할 수 있다. 이 계층적 구조는 복잡한 약물 개발 워크플로우를 효과적으로 관리하면서 AI 에이전트의 성능 일관성을 높인다. 본 연구는 기존 에이전트의 한계를 극복하고 계산 기반 신약 개발의 효율성을 크게 향상시킬 수 있음을 시사한다. 다만 실제 임상 환경에서의 검증과 다양한 분자 유형에 대한 추가 연구가 필요하다.

articles.title: Read the Paper, Write the Code: Agentic Reproduction of Social-Science Results
articles.titleKo: 논문을 읽고 코드를 작성하다: 사회과학 결과의 에이전트 기반 재현
articles.summary: arXiv:2604.21965v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Recent work has used LLM agents to reproduce empirical social science results with access to both the data and code. We broaden this scope by asking: Can they reproduce results given only a paper's methods description and original data? We develop an agentic reproduction system that extracts structured methods descriptions from papers, runs reimplementations under strict information isolation -- agents never see the original code, results, or paper -- and enables deterministic, cell-level comparison of reproduced outputs to the original results.
articles.aiSummary:
This study investigates whether large language model (LLM)-based AI agents can reproduce social science research results using only paper method descriptions and original data, without access to the original code. While previous work provided agents with both code and results, this research team developed a novel system testing reproduction capability under strict information isolation. The researchers automatically extract structured method descriptions from papers and have agents reimplemented analyses in a controlled environment where they cannot see original code, results, or papers. The system enables deterministic, cell-level comparison of reproduced outputs against original results. This approach demonstrates potential to automate scientific transparency and reproducibility, thereby enhancing academic credibility. However, limitations include unclear success rates across different study types, handling of complex statistical methodologies, and the impact of ambiguity in natural language descriptions on reproduction accuracy.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
이 연구는 대규모 언어모델(LLM) 기반 AI 에이전트가 사회과학 논문의 방법론 설명과 원본 데이터만으로 연구 결과를 재현할 수 있는지를 탐구합니다. 기존 연구들은 에이전트에게 원본 코드와 결과를 제공했지만, 이 연구팀은 이러한 정보 없이도 재현이 가능한지 테스트하는 새로운 시스템을 개발했습니다. 연구자들은 논문에서 자동으로 구조화된 방법론 설명을 추출하고, 에이전트가 원본 코드나 결과를 보지 못하도록 엄격하게 격리된 환경에서 재구현을 수행하도록 설계했습니다. 이 시스템은 재현된 결과를 셀(cell) 단위로 원본 결과와 결정적으로 비교할 수 있습니다. 이러한 접근법은 과학적 투명성과 재현 가능성을 자동화하여 학문적 신뢰성을 높일 수 있는 잠재력을 보여줍니다. 다만 연구에서는 재현 성공률, 복잡한 통계 방법론 처리, 그리고 자연어 설명의 모호성이 얼마나 영향을 미치는지 구체적으로 밝혀야 한다는 한계가 있습니다.

##

While previous work provided agents with both code and results, this research team developed a novel system testing reproduction capability under strict information isolation. The researchers automatically extract structured method descriptions from papers and have agents reimplemented analyses in a controlled environment where they cannot see original code, results, or papers. The system enables deterministic, cell-level comparison of reproduced outputs against original results. This approach demonstrates potential to automate scientific transparency and reproducibility, thereby enhancing academic credibility. However, limitations include unclear success rates across different study types, handling of complex statistical methodologies, and the impact of ambiguity in natural language descriptions on reproduction accuracy.

##
keyPoints: **정보 격리 기반 재현 / Information-Isolated Reproduction**: AI 에이전트가 원본 코드와 결과를 보지 못한 상태에서 논문 방법론만으로 연구 결과를 독립적으로 재현 가능 여부를 검증하는 혁신적 접근법
**자동화된 방법론 추출 / Automated Methodology Extraction**: 논문 텍스트에서 구조화된 방법론 설명을 자동으로 추출하여 에이전트가 활용할 수 있는 형태로 변환하는 기술
**셀 단위 결과 비교 / Cell-Level Result Comparison**: 재현된 분석 결과를 원본과 결정적으로 비교하는 정교한 검증 메커니즘으로 과학적 투명성 강화
**학문적 신뢰성 자동화 / Automated Scientific Credibility**: 수작업 재현 검증을 자동화하여 사회과학 논문의 재현 가능성을 대규모로 검증하고 연구 신뢰도를 객관적으로 평가할 수 있는 기반 마련

articles.title: The Spectral Lifecycle of Transformer Training: Transient Compression Waves, Persistent Spectral Gradients, and the Q/K--V Asymmetry
articles.titleKo: 트랜스포머 훈련의 스펙트럼 생명주기: 일시적 압축파, 지속적 스펙트럼 기울기, 그리고 Q/K-V 비대칭성
articles.summary: arXiv:2604.22778v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present the first systematic study of weight matrix singular value spectra \emph{during} transformer pretraining, tracking full SVD decompositions of every weight matrix at 25-step intervals across three model scales (30M--285M parameters). We discover three phenomena: \textbf{(1)~Transient Compression Waves:} stable rank compression propagates as a traveling wave from early to late layers, creating a dramatic gradient that peaks early then \emph{reverses} -- late layers eventually over-compress past early layers. \textbf{(2)~Persistent Spectr
articles.aiSummary:
This is the first systematic study examining how weight matrix singular value spectra change during transformer pretraining. The researchers tracked full SVD decompositions of all weight matrices at 25-step intervals across three model scales (30M-285M parameters). The study revealed three key phenomena: (1) Transient Compression Waves, where stable rank compression propagates as a traveling wave from early to late layers, creating a dramatic gradient that peaks early then reverses, with late layers eventually over-compressing beyond early layers. (2) Persistent Spectral Gradients that maintain consistent patterns throughout training. (3) Q/K-V Asymmetry in attention mechanisms. These findings provide crucial insights into the internal dynamics of neural network learning and could contribute to more efficient model design and training optimization in the future. However, the current analysis is limited to specific model scales.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
본 연구는 트랜스포머 모델의 사전학습 과정에서 가중치 행렬의 특이값 스펙트럼이 어떻게 변화하는지 체계적으로 분석한 첫 번째 연구입니다. 연구팀은 3가지 규모(3천만~2억8천5백만 개 매개변수)의 모델에서 25단계 간격으로 전체 가중치 행렬의 특이값 분해(SVD)를 추적했습니다. 연구 결과 세 가지 주요 현상을 발견했습니다: 첫째, '일시적 압축파(Transient Compression Waves)'로 초기 층에서 후기 층으로 압축이 파동처럼 전파되며 초기에 급격한 기울기를 보이다가 반전되어 후기 층이 결국 초기 층보다 과도하게 압축됩니다. 둘째, '지속적 스펙트럼 기울기'가 학습 전 과정에서 계속 유지됩니다. 셋째, Q/K-V 행렬 간 비대칭성이 관찰됩니다. 이 연구는 신경망 학습의 내부 동작 메커니즘을 이해하는 데 중요하며, 향후 더 효율적인 모델 설계와 학습 최적화에 기여할 수 있습니다. 다만 현재는 특정 규모의 모델에 한정된 분석이라는 한계가 있습니다.

##
articles.aiSummaryEn:
This is the first systematic study examining how weight matrix singular value spectra change during transformer pretraining. The researchers tracked full SVD decompositions of all weight matrices at 25-step intervals across three model scales (30M-285M parameters). The study revealed three key phenomena: (1) Transient Compression Waves, where stable rank compression propagates as a traveling wave from early to late layers, creating a dramatic gradient that peaks early then reverses, with late layers eventually over-compressing beyond early layers. (2) Persistent Spectral Gradients that maintain consistent patterns throughout training. (3) Q/K-V Asymmetry in attention mechanisms. These findings provide crucial insights into the internal dynamics of neural network learning and could contribute to more efficient model design and training optimization in the future. However, the current analysis is limited to specific model scales.

##
keyPoints: **일시적 압축파** / Transient Compression Waves: 안정적 순위(stable rank)의 압축이 초기층에서 후기층으로 파동처럼 전파되며, 초기에 급격한 기울기를 보이다가 반전되어 후기층이 최종적으로 초기층보다 더 압축되는 현상
**지속적 스펙트럼 기울기** / Persistent Spectral Gradients: 특이값 스펙트럼의 기울기 패턴이 전체 학습 과정 동안 일관되게 유지되는 특성
**Q/K-V 비대칭성** / Q/K-V Asymmetry: 어텐션 메커니즘의 Query/Key와 Value 행렬 간 다른 스펙트럼 특성을 보이는 현상
**다중 모델 규모 검증** / Multi-scale Validation: 3천만~2억8천5백만 개 매개변수의 다양한 모델 규모에서 일관된 패턴을 확인하여 발견의 일반화 가능성 제시

articles.title: KARL: Mitigating Hallucinations in LLMs via Knowledge-Boundary-Aware Reinforcement Learning
articles.titleKo: KARL: 지식-경계-인식 강화학습을 통한 대규모언어모델의 환각 완화
articles.summary: arXiv:2604.22779v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Enabling large language models (LLMs) to appropriately abstain from answering questions beyond their knowledge is crucial for mitigating hallucinations. While existing reinforcement learning methods foster autonomous abstention, they often compromise answer accuracy because their static reward mechanisms, agnostic to models' knowledge boundaries, drive models toward excessive caution. In this work, we propose KARL, a novel framework that continuously aligns an LLM's abstention behavior with its evolving knowledge boundary. KARL introduces two cor
articles.aiSummary:
Enabling large language models (LLMs) to appropriately decline questions beyond their knowledge boundaries is crucial for mitigating hallucinations and improving reliability. Existing reinforcement learning approaches promote abstention behavior but often sacrifice answer accuracy because their static reward mechanisms ignore models' actual knowledge boundaries, leading to excessive caution. This research introduces KARL, a novel framework that continuously aligns an LLM's abstention behavior with its evolving knowledge boundary through dynamic adjustments. KARL incorporates two core mechanisms that help models better distinguish between what they know and don't know. The significance of this work lies in addressing the hallucination problem while maintaining answer accuracy, a challenge previous methods struggled to balance. However, the study remains in early stages and requires extensive real-world testing before practical deployment.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
대규모 언어모델(LLM)이 자신의 지식 범위를 벗어난 질문에 답변을 거부할 수 있도록 학습하는 것이 환각(거짓 정보 생성) 문제 해결의 핵심입니다. 기존의 강화학습 방법들은 모델이 답변을 거부하도록 유도하지만, 모델의 실제 지식 범위를 고려하지 않는 고정된 보상 체계로 인해 정확한 답변 능력을 떨어뜨리는 문제가 있었습니다. 본 연구에서는 KARL이라는 새로운 프레임워크를 제안하며, 이는 LLM의 지식 경계와 그 변화에 맞춰 답변 거부 행동을 지속적으로 조정합니다. KARL은 두 가지 핵심 메커니즘을 도입하여 모델이 자신이 알고 있는 것과 모르는 것을 더 잘 구분하도록 학습시킵니다. 이 연구의 의의는 환각 문제를 완화하면서도 모델의 답변 정확도를 유지할 수 있는 방법을 제시한 것입니다. 다만 연구가 아직 초기 단계로 대규모 실제 환경 테스트가 필요한 한계가 있습니다.

##

KARL incorporates two core mechanisms that help models better distinguish between what they know and don't know. The significance of this work lies in addressing the hallucination problem while maintaining answer accuracy, a challenge previous methods struggled to balance. ##
keyPoints: **환각 문제의 원인과 해결 방향** / Root cause of hallucinations and solution approach: 기존 방법의 정적 보상 체계 문제를 동적 지식 경계 인식으로 해결
**KARL 프레임워크의 혁신성** / Innovation of KARL framework: 지식 경계에 맞춰 답변 거부 행동을 지속적으로 정렬하는 새로운 강화학습 방식
**성능과 신뢰성의 균형** / Balance between performance and reliability: 답변 정확도를 유지하면서 동시에 환각을 줄이는 이중 최적화
**실용화를 위한 과제** / Challenges for practical implementation: 대규모 실제 환경에서의 검증 및 성능 평가 필요

articles.title: BiTA: Bidirectional Gated Recurrent Unit-Transformer Aggregator in a Temporal Graph Network Framework for Alert Prediction in Computer Networks
articles.titleKo: BiTA: 컴퓨터 네트워크의 알림 예측을 위한 시간 그래프 네트워크 프레임워크에서의 양방향 게이트 순환 신경망-트랜스포머 집계기
articles.summary: arXiv:2604.22781v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Proactive alert prediction in computer networks is critical for mitigating evolving cyber threats and enabling timely defensive actions. Temporal Graph Neural Networks (TGNs) provide a principled framework for modeling time-evolving interactions; however, existing TGN-based methods predominantly rely on unidirectional or single-mechanism temporal aggregation, which limits their ability to capture recursive, multi-scale temporal patterns commonly observed in real-world attack behaviors. In this paper, we propose BiTA, a Bidirectional Gated Recurre
articles.aiSummary:
Proactive alert prediction in computer networks is essential for mitigating sophisticated and evolving cyber threats. Existing Temporal Graph Neural Network (TGN) methods rely on unidirectional or single-mechanism temporal aggregation, limiting their ability to capture complex, multi-scale attack patterns observed in real-world scenarios. This paper introduces BiTA (Bidirectional Gated Recurrent Unit-Transformer Aggregator), a novel framework that processes temporal information bidirectionally and captures recursive patterns at multiple time scales. The proposed model demonstrates superior performance in predicting network attacks earlier than traditional methods, enabling faster defensive responses. However, the study's limitations include the need for validation on large-scale industrial networks and further assessment of computational efficiency in real-world deployment scenarios.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
컴퓨터 네트워크의 사이버 공격을 미리 예측하는 것은 점점 진화하는 보안 위협에 대응하기 위해 매우 중요합니다. 기존 시계열 그래프 신경망(TGN) 기반 방법들은 단방향 또는 단일 메커니즘을 사용하여 시간 정보를 처리했기 때문에, 실제 공격의 복잡한 패턴을 충분히 포착하지 못했습니다. 본 연구에서는 BiTA(양방향 게이트 순환 신경망-트랜스포머 집계기)라는 새로운 모델을 제안하였으며, 이는 양방향 처리와 다중 규모의 시간 패턴을 동시에 분석할 수 있습니다. 이 모델은 기존 방법들보다 더 정확하게 네트워크 공격 신호를 조기에 감지할 수 있어 방어 조치를 더 빠르게 취할 수 있게 합니다. 다만, 실제 산업 환경의 대규모 네트워크에서의 성능과 계산 효율성은 추가 검증이 필요합니다.

##
articles.aiSummaryEn:
Proactive alert prediction in computer networks is essential for mitigating sophisticated and evolving cyber threats. Existing Temporal Graph Neural Network (TGN) methods rely on unidirectional or single-mechanism temporal aggregation, limiting their ability to capture complex, multi-scale attack patterns observed in real-world scenarios. This paper introduces BiTA (Bidirectional Gated Recurrent Unit-Transformer Aggregator), a novel framework that processes temporal information bidirectionally and captures recursive patterns at multiple time scales. The proposed model demonstrates superior performance in predicting network attacks earlier than traditional methods, enabling faster defensive responses. However, the study's limitations include the need for validation on large-scale industrial networks and further assessment of computational efficiency in real-world deployment scenarios.

##
keyPoints: **양방향 처리의 필요성** / **Bidirectional Processing Necessity**: 단방향 분석보다 양방향 처리가 네트워크 공격의 복잡한 시계열 패턴을 더 정확히 포착할 수 있음
**다중 규모 시간 패턴 분석** / **Multi-Scale Temporal Pattern Analysis**: GRU(게이트 순환 신경망)와 트랜스포머를 결합하여 다양한 시간 규모의 공격 신호를 동시에 감지
**조기 경고 예측 성능 향상** / **Enhanced Early Alert Prediction**: BiTA는 기존 TGN 기반 방법들보다 사이버 공격을 더 빠르고 정확하게 예측하여 방어 대응 시간 확보
**실무 적용 검증 필요** / **Validation for Practical Implementation**: 대규모 실제 네트워크 환경에서의 성능과 계산 효율성에 대한 추가 연구 필요

articles.aiSummary:
Serving transformer language models efficiently requires caching Key-Value (KV) pairs to avoid redundant computation during autoregressive generation, but this creates significant memory overhead that increases serving costs. This research proposes "Stochastic KV Routing," which optimizes KV cache sharing along the depth dimension of neural networks, orthogonal to existing temporal-axis compression and eviction methods. Unlike prior work assuming all layers require identical KV caches, this study demonstrates that different transformer layers can selectively share KV caches. The method enables adaptive depth-wise cache sharing that improves memory efficiency while maintaining model performance. The significance lies in opening a new optimization direction for KV cache management and reducing language model serving costs. However, validation in production environments and generalizability across different model sizes require further investigation.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
트랜스포머 언어 모델을 효율적으로 운영하기 위해서는 자동 회귀 생성 과정에서 불필요한 계산을 피하기 위해 Key-Value(KV) 캐시를 저장해야 하는데, 이는 상당한 메모리 비용을 발생시킵니다. 본 연구는 기존에 시간 축(temporal axis) 방향의 KV 캐시 압축 및 제거 방식과 달리, 신경망의 깊이(depth) 차원에서 캐시 공유를 최적화하는 "확률적 KV 라우팅(Stochastic KV Routing)" 방법을 제안합니다. 이전 연구들이 전체 깊이에서 동일한 KV 캐시가 필요하다고 가정했던 것과 달리, 본 연구는 신경망의 서로 다른 층(layer)이 KV 캐시를 선택적으로 공유할 수 있음을 보여줍니다. 이 방법은 적응형(adaptive) 깊이 방향 캐시 공유를 통해 메모리 효율성을 높이면서도 모델 성능을 유지할 수 있습니다. 연구의 의의는 KV 캐시 최적화의 새로운 방향을 제시하며 언어 모델 서빙 비용을 절감할 수 있다는 점입니다. 다만, 실제 프로덕션 환경에서의 성능 검증과 다양한 모델 크기에 대한 일반화 가능성은 추가 검증이 필요합니다.

##

This research proposes "Stochastic KV Routing," which optimizes KV cache sharing along the depth dimension of neural networks, orthogonal to existing temporal-axis compression and eviction methods. The significance lies in opening a new optimization direction for KV cache management and reducing language model serving costs. However, validation in production environments and generalizability across different model sizes require further investigation.

##
keyPoints: **혁신적 최적화 방향**: 기존의 시간 축(temporal) 중심 KV 캐시 압축에서 벗어나 깊이 축(depth) 차원의 캐시 공유를 새롭게 제안 / Novel optimization direction: Shifts from temporal-axis compression to depth-wise cache sharing, a novel approach

**성능 유지와 비용 절감의 균형**: 모델의 생성 품질을 유지하면서 메모리 사용량을 감소시켜 언어 모델 서빙 비용 절감 / Cost-performance balance: Reduces serving costs while maintaining generation quality and model performance

**근본적 가정의 재검토**: 전체 깊이에서 동일한 KV 캐시 필요성이라는 기존 가정을 도전하며 신경망 설계의 새로운 이해 제공 / Challenging conventional assumptions: Questions the necessity of identical KV caches across all layers, providing new insights into network design

articles.title: Scientists discover how local brain cells hijack serotonin signaling
articles.titleKo: 과학자들, 국소 뇌세포의 세로토닌 신호 전달 탈취 메커니즘 규명
articles.summary: Scientists have discovered that the chemical acetylcholine can directly trigger the release of serotonin. This localized control system becomes hyperactive in mice with obsessive-compulsive traits, offering a fresh perspective on the biological roots of repetitive psychiatric conditions.
articles.aiSummary:
Neuroscientists have discovered a new mechanism of interaction between brain neurotransmitters. The research team confirmed that acetylcholine, a chemical substance in the mouse brain, can directly trigger serotonin release through localized control systems. Notably, this neural signaling system becomes hyperactive in mice displaying obsessive-compulsive traits, suggesting a biological basis for repetitive psychiatric conditions. This discovery provides a fresh perspective on understanding the neurological mechanisms underlying obsessive-compulsive disorder and similar behavioral conditions. The findings could lead to the development of novel therapeutic targets for treating repetitive behavior-related disorders such as OCD and addiction. However, since this research is based on animal experiments, further validation is needed to confirm whether identical mechanisms operate in humans.

#

articles.title: Narcissism runs in the family, but not because of parenting
articles.titleKo: 자기애는 가족력이 있지만, 양육 방식 때문은 아니다
articles.summary: A comprehensive assessment of twins and their families reveals that narcissistic traits are inherited genetically, contradicting the popular belief that parenting styles cause narcissism. Individual experiences outside the home shape the remaining variations in this personality trait.
articles.aiSummary:
This research challenges the widespread belief that parenting styles cause narcissistic personality traits. Researchers conducted a comprehensive assessment of twins and their families, finding that narcissistic characteristics are primarily inherited genetically rather than shaped by parental upbringing. Specifically, a substantial portion of variations in narcissistic traits is determined by genetic factors, while the remaining variations are shaped by individual experiences outside the home, such as peer relationships, school experiences, and social interactions. The study has significant implications for changing misconceptions about narcissistic personality development and suggests that parents need not bear excessive responsibility for their children's narcissistic tendencies. However, the research may be limited to specific cultural and socioeconomic contexts, and it does not fully explain the complex mechanisms of gene-environment interactions.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
이 연구는 자기애적 성격이 부모의 양육 방식 때문이라는 일반적인 믿음에 의문을 제기합니다. 연구팀은 쌍둥이와 그들의 가족을 대상으로 포괄적인 평가를 실시하여 자기애적 특성이 주로 유전적으로 물려받는다는 것을 발견했습니다. 구체적으로, 자기애 특성의 변이 중 상당 부분이 유전 요인에 의해 결정되며, 나머지 변이는 가정 밖의 개별적 경험들(친구 관계, 학교 경험, 사회적 상호작용 등)에 의해 형성됩니다. 이 연구는 자기애 성격 발달에 대한 통념을 바꾸는 중요한 의미를 가지며, 부모들이 자녀의 자기애 형성에 대해 과도한 책임감을 가질 필요가 없다는 점을 시사합니다. 다만, 이 연구는 특정 문화권과 사회계층에 국한될 수 있으며, 유전과 환경 상호작용의 복잡한 메커니즘을 완전히 설명하지 못한다는 한계가 있습니다.

articles.titleKo: 장시간 인지 과제로 인한 정신 피로 수준과 균형 장애 정도 간의 관계
articles.summary: arXiv:2604.22796v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This study investigated the effects of mental fatigue (MF) induced by a 90-min AX-continuous performance test (AX-CPT) on balance control by addressing the issue of the heterogeneity of individuals' responses. Twenty healthy young active participants were recruited. They had to carry out two balance tasks (sway as little as possible on a stable support with the eyes open and closed) when standing on a force platform before and after performing a 90-min AX-CPT. The NASA-TLX test was used to assess the subjective manifestations of MF. Objective cog
articles.aiSummary:
This study investigated how mental fatigue induced by prolonged cognitive tasks affects postural balance control, considering individual differences in responses. Twenty healthy young adults participated in the research, completing a 90-minute AX-Continuous Performance Test (AX-CPT) requiring sustained attention and concentration. Before and after the cognitive task, participants performed balance tests on a force platform under two conditions: maintaining stability with eyes open and closed on a stable surface. Mental fatigue was assessed subjectively using the NASA-TLX questionnaire, while objective cognitive performance was evaluated through task data collected during the AX-CPT. The key finding is the relationship between the degree of mental fatigue and balance disturbance while accounting for individual variability. Results suggest that mental fatigue from prolonged concentration may compromise postural stability and body control. Limitations include the small sample size of 20 participants and recruitment limited to young adults only.

##

articles.title: Vision as looking and seeing through a bottleneck
articles.titleKo: 병목 현상을 통한 보기와 보는 행위로서의 시각
articles.summary: arXiv:2604.23030v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Progress in vision research has been slower downstream than upstream of primary visual cortex (V1). Traditional frameworks have largely overlooked a central constraint: only a tiny fraction of retinal input is recognized. Thus, to a first approximation, vision is better formulated as looking and seeing through a bottleneck. Looking, mainly by the peripheral visual field, selects visual information to enter this bottleneck, largely via gaze shifts that center selected contents at fovea. Seeing, mainly by the central visual field, recognizes this c
articles.aiSummary:
This research presents a novel theoretical framework explaining why progress in vision research has been slower downstream than upstream of the primary visual cortex (V1). The researchers emphasize a fundamental constraint: only a tiny fraction of retinal input is consciously recognized. According to this study, vision can be more accurately formulated as "looking and seeing through a bottleneck." In the 'looking' stage, the peripheral visual field plays a crucial role, and gaze shifts direct selected visual information to the fovea at the center of the retina. In the 'seeing' stage, the central visual field primarily recognizes and processes this bottlenecked information. This framework explains limitations of existing visual research paradigms and provides direction for future vision science research. However, as a theoretical proposal, it requires further neurophysiological validation and quantitative experimental data.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
본 연구는 시각 연구에서 뇌의 1차 시각 피질(V1) 이후 진전이 느린 이유를 설명하는 새로운 이론적 틀을 제시합니다. 연구진은 망막에서 들어오는 모든 시각 정보 중 극히 일부만 인식된다는 핵심 제약을 중심으로 시각 과정을 재해석했습니다. 이 연구에 따르면 시각은 "병목(bottleneck)을 통한 보기와 보는 것"으로 더 정확하게 설명할 수 있습니다. '보기(looking)' 단계에서는 주변 시야가 중요한 역할을 하며, 시선 이동을 통해 선택된 시각 정보를 망막의 중심부인 황반부(fovea)에 집중시킵니다. '보는 것(seeing)' 단계에서는 중심 시야가 주로 이 병목된 정보를 인식하고 처리합니다. 이 틀은 기존의 시각 연구 패러다임의 한계를 설명하고, 앞으로의 시각 과학 연구 방향을 제시하는 데 의의가 있습니다. 다만 이는 이론적 제안으로서, 구체적인 신경생리학적 검증과 정량적 실험 데이터가 추가로 필요합니다.

##
keyPoints: **시각의 병목 구조** / Visual bottleneck structure: 망막의 모든 정보가 아닌 극소량의 정보만 의식적으로 인식되며, 이것이 시각 과정의 근본적 제약임
**'보기'와 '보는 것'의 분리** / Separation of 'looking' and 'seeing': 주변 시야를 통한 정보 선택(looking)과 중심 시야를 통한 정보 인식(seeing)이 시각의 두 가지 핵심 과정
**시선 이동의 역할** / Role of gaze shifts: 선택된 시각 정보를 황반부에 집중시키는 메커니즘으로 작동하여 효율적 정보 처리를 가능하게 함

articles.title: Triple Configuration of Brain Networks Based on Recurrent Neural Networks: The Synergistic Effects of Exogenous Stimuli, Task Demands, and Spontaneous Activity
articles.titleKo: 반복신경망 기반 뇌 네트워크의 삼중 구성: 외부 자극, 과제 요구, 그리고 자발적 활동의 상승작용
articles.summary: arXiv:2604.23525v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The foundation of cognitive flexibility and higher-order intelligence lies in the functional structure and activity of brain networks, which can be dynamically configured by both external environments and internal states. However, decoding these dynamics from high-dimensional neural data remains a challenge. In this study, we propose a computational framework using Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) with neural dynamic constraints to model source-localized resting-state EEG data from $114$ participants. We aim to clarify the "triple brain network c
articles.aiSummary:
This study investigates how brain networks—the foundation of cognitive flexibility and higher-order intelligence—dynamically reconfigure in response to external environments and internal states. Researchers developed a computational model using Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) with neural dynamic constraints to analyze resting-state EEG data from 114 participants. The model aims to clarify the "triple configuration" of brain networks by examining how three factors—exogenous stimuli, task demands, and spontaneous brain activity—synergistically interact to shape neural network organization. The findings suggest that brain functional structure is not static but dynamically reorganizes across different conditions. These insights could provide new perspectives for understanding and treating cognitive disorders and neuropsychiatric conditions. However, the research is in preliminary stages and requires validation across larger samples and diverse clinical populations.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:

articles.title: EyeBrain: Left and Right Brain Lateralization Activity Classification Through Pupil Diameter and Fixation Duration
articles.titleKo: 눈과 뇌: 동공 크기와 시선 고정 시간을 통한 좌뇌와 우뇌 측화 활동 분류
articles.summary: arXiv:2604.23562v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The relationship between brain lateralization and cognitive functions is well-documented. The left hemisphere primarily handles tasks such as language and arithmetic, while the right hemisphere is involved in creative activities like drawing and music perception. Eye-tracking technology has shown the potential to reveal cognitive states by measuring ocular metrics such as pupil diameter and fixation duration. However, the ability to distinguish lateralized brain activity using these ocular metrics remains underexplored. Here, we demonstrate that
articles.aiSummary:
The human brain exhibits lateralization, where the left hemisphere handles logical tasks like language and arithmetic, while the right hemisphere manages creative activities such as drawing and music perception. This study investigated whether eye-tracking metrics—specifically pupil diameter and fixation duration—could distinguish between activated brain hemispheres. Although previous research demonstrated that ocular metrics reflect cognitive states, their application to identifying lateralized brain activity remained underexplored. Using machine learning models, the EyeBrain research demonstrated that these eye-based measurements alone could classify brain hemisphere activation patterns. This breakthrough suggests potential applications in developing sophisticated brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) and advancing neuro-psychological diagnostics. However, the study faces limitations including small sample sizes and restricted experimental environments, requiring further validation through larger-scale and more diverse experimental conditions.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:

EyeBrain 연구는 기계학습 모델을 활용하여 안구 측정값만으로 뇌 반구의 활성화 패턴을 분류할 수 있음을 보여줌으로써, 향후 더 정교한 뇌-컴퓨터 인터페이스(BCI) 개발과 신경심리학적 진단에 활용될 가능성을 제시했습니다. 다만 이 연구는 작은 샘플 규모와 제한된 실험 환경에서 진행되어, 더 대규모이고 다양한 실험 조건에서의 검증이 필요합니다.

articles.title: Large study finds no meaningful link between meat consumption and depression
articles.titleKo: 대규모 연구, 육류 섭취와 우울증 사이의 의미 있는 연관성 없음을 발견
articles.summary: A new study of nearly 80,000 people reveals that the link between eating meat and depression is exceptionally weak. The findings suggest that avoiding animal products is not a meaningful risk factor for developing depressive symptoms.
articles.aiSummary:
A large-scale study involving approximately 80,000 participants has revealed that the link between meat consumption and depression is exceptionally weak. The research suggests that avoiding animal products is not a meaningful risk factor for developing depressive symptoms. The researchers analyzed data from the large sample and produced statistically significant results, prompting reconsideration of previously assumed causal relationships between meat consumption and mental health. The significance of this study lies in its proposition that dietary choices may have a much smaller impact on depression development than previously thought. However, the study may be cross-sectional in nature, limiting its ability to establish causality, and it may not have fully controlled for confounding variables such as individual dietary patterns and other psychosocial factors. Further longitudinal research and more rigorous variable control are needed to clarify the relationship between meat consumption and mental health.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
최근 약 8만 명을 대상으로 한 대규모 연구에서 육류 섭취와 우울증 사이의 연관성이 매우 미약함을 밝혔습니다. 이 연구는 육류 섭취 여부가 우울증 발병의 의미 있는 위험 요소가 아니라는 것을 시사합니다. 연구진은 대규모 표본을 통해 통계적으로 유의미한 결과를 도출했으며, 이는 기존의 육류 섭취와 정신 건강 간의 인과관계를 재고하게 합니다. 연구의 의의는 식단 선택이 우울증 발생에 미치는 영향이 이전에 생각했던 것보다 훨씬 작을 수 있다는 점을 제시한 것입니다. 다만 이 연구는 횡단 연구일 가능성이 높아 인과관계 규명에는 한계가 있으며, 개인의 식습관 패턴이나 다른 심리사회적 요인들의 영향을 완전히 통제하지 못했을 가능성이 있습니다. 추후 종단 연구와 더 정교한 변수 통제를 통해 육류 섭취와 정신 건강의 관계를 보다 명확히 규명할 필요가 있습니다.

articles.title: Frequent church attendance strongly predicts whether a woman will marry before having a child
articles.titleKo: 자주 교회에 다니는 것이 여성의 혼전 출산 여부를 강하게 예측한다
articles.summary: A recent study shows that highly religious women are much more likely to marry before cohabiting. Surprisingly, this trend isn't just about abstinence, as the vast majority of these brides still have premarital sex.
articles.aiSummary:
This study examines how religious participation influences women's marriage timing and the sequence of life events. Researchers compared marriage and cohabitation patterns between women with high and low church attendance frequencies. The key finding is that women who frequently attend church are significantly more likely to marry before cohabiting or having children. Notably, the majority of these women had premarital sexual relationships despite prioritizing marriage, suggesting religion influences the importance of marriage as an institution rather than merely enforcing sexual abstinence. The research demonstrates correlation rather than direct causation, indicating that religious faith may not be the sole factor determining marriage decisions. However, the study's limitations include potential incomplete control of socioeconomic variables that could independently influence marriage patterns.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
본 연구는 종교 활동이 여성의 결혼 시기와 출산 순서에 미치는 영향을 조사했습니다. 연구팀은 종교 활동 빈도가 높은 여성들과 낮은 여성들의 결혼 및 동거 패턴을 비교 분석했습니다. 핵심 결과는 교회에 자주 다니는 여성들이 동거 또는 출산 전에 결혼할 확률이 훨씬 높다는 것입니다. 특히 흥미로운 점은 이러한 여성들의 대다수가 혼전 성관계를 경험했음에도 불구하고 결혼을 우선시한다는 사실입니다. 이는 종교가 단순한 성적 금욕이 아니라 결혼 제도 자체의 중요성을 강조하는 데 영향을 미친다는 것을 시사합니다. 다만 본 연구는 상관관계를 보여줄 뿐 종교가 결혼 결정의 직접적인 원인인지는 확실하지 않으며, 다양한 사회경제적 요인들의 영향을 완전히 통제하지 못했을 가능성이 있습니다.

articles.title: What computer simulations reveal about the evolutionary purpose of gaming
articles.titleKo: 컴퓨터 시뮬레이션이 밝혀낸 게임의 진화적 목적
articles.summary: New research in Evolution and Human Behavior suggests the social benefits of gaming depend on the context. While games might not immediately forge friendships, computer simulations indicate the behavior evolved as a survival strategy to assess potential allies.
articles.aiSummary:
New research published in *Evolution and Human Behavior* challenges the assumption that gaming primarily serves to build friendships, suggesting instead that it evolved as a survival strategy. Using computer simulations, researchers analyzed the social functionality of gaming behavior in human evolution. The study reveals that while games may not directly forge friendships, they function as a mechanism for assessing potential allies—evaluating their competence, reliability, and cooperation intentions. By observing behavioral patterns and strategic choices during gameplay, individuals can effectively evaluate whether potential collaborators would be trustworthy team members. This finding suggests that gaming played a crucial role in ancestral societies for selecting reliable partners essential to survival. However, the research has limitations, including its inability to fully capture the diverse social contexts of modern gaming and the need for further empirical validation in contemporary settings.

##

articles.title: A simple “blank screen” test revealed a key fact about the psychology of neuroticism
articles.titleKo: 단순한 '검은 화면' 테스트가 신경증의 심리에 대한 핵심 사실을 드러내다
articles.summary: When left with nothing to do, highly neurotic individuals tend to focus on their problems and uncertainties. Recent research suggests this natural tendency to generate negative thoughts explains why they often feel anxious without any immediate stressors.
articles.aiSummary:
Recent research investigated the psychological characteristics of individuals with high neuroticism tendencies. Researchers designed a simple experiment where participants sat in front of a blank screen with no specific tasks assigned. The key findings revealed that highly neurotic individuals tend to focus on their problems and uncertainties when idle, while those with lower neuroticism showed more relaxed mental states. This study demonstrates that the automatic generation of negative thoughts explains why neurotic individuals often experience anxiety without external stressors. The research suggests that this mental pattern is an inherent characteristic of the neurotic personality. However, the study has limitations including limited participant diversity and the artificial nature of the laboratory environment.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
신경증 성향이 높은 사람들의 심리적 특성을 규명하기 위한 연구가 진행되었습니다. 연구진은 참가자들에게 특별한 과제 없이 빈 화면 앞에 앉도록 하는 간단한 실험을 설계했습니다. 실험 결과, 신경증 성향이 높은 개인들은 아무 일도 하지 않을 때 자신의 문제와 불확실성에 집중하는 경향을 보였습니다. 반면 신경증 성향이 낮은 사람들은 마음을 더 자유롭게 두었습니다. 이 연구는 신경증이 높은 사람들이 외부 스트레스 요인이 없어도 불안감을 느끼는 이유가 자동으로 부정적 사고를 생성하는 뇌의 특성 때문임을 보여줍니다. 다만 이 연구는 참가자의 다양성과 실험실 환경의 인위성이라는 한계를 가지고 있습니다.

##
articles.aiSummaryEn:
Recent research investigated the psychological characteristics of individuals with high neuroticism tendencies. Researchers designed a simple experiment where participants sat in front of a blank screen with no specific tasks assigned. The key findings revealed that highly neurotic individuals tend to focus on their problems and uncertainties when idle, while those with lower neuroticism showed more relaxed mental states. This study demonstrates that the automatic generation of negative thoughts explains why neurotic individuals often experience anxiety without external stressors. The research suggests that this mental pattern is an inherent characteristic of the neurotic personality. However, the study has limitations including limited participant diversity and the artificial nature of the laboratory environment.

##
keyPoints: **신경증 특성과 자동 부정사고**: 신경증 성향이 높은 사람들은 아무것도 하지 않을 때 자동으로 부정적 생각을 생성하는 경향이 있음 / Highly neurotic individuals automatically generate negative thoughts when idle with no external stimuli
**외부 스트레스 부재 시에도 불안 경험**: 신경증이 높은 사람들의 불안감은 실제 스트레스 요인이 없어도 내부적 부정사고 때문에 발생함 / Anxiety in high-neuroticism individuals occurs due to internal negative thoughts rather than external stressors

**간단한 "빈 화면" 실험의 효과성**: 특별한 심리검사 없이 단순한 실험 환경으로도 신경증의 핵심 특성을 파악할 수 있음을 보여줌 / A simple blank screen test proved effective in revealing core psychological characteristics without complex assessment tools

**신경증 이해의 임상적 의의**: 이 발견은 신경증 관련 불안 장애 치료의 기초가 될 수 있으며, 부정적 사고 패턴에 대한 개입 전략 개발에 도움이 될 수 있음 / Findings have potential clinical significance for treating anxiety disorders and developing intervention strategies targeting negative thought patterns

articles.title: The Hard Truths Behavioral Science Must Face in Conflict Settings
articles.titleKo: 갈등 상황에서 행동과학이 직면해야 할 어려운 진실들
articles.summary: Approximately 2 billion people live in conflict-affected areas. Yet the field of behavioral science has developed most of its theories, run most of its experiments, and built most of its interventions in stable contexts. When behavioral scientists do work in conflict settings, we tend to follow a familiar pattern: take what worked elsewhere, “localize” it, and evaluate it. But this isn’t enough. This is an urgent problem. Conflict is reshaping lives globally at an unprecedented scale. In 2024, 123 million people were forcibly displaced —the highest number on record. Civilian casualties in Gaza
articles.aiSummary:
Approximately 2 billion people live in conflict-affected areas, yet behavioral science has developed most of its theories, experiments, and interventions in stable contexts, which is identified as a critical problem. When behavioral scientists work in conflict settings, they typically apply a conventional pattern: adapting successful interventions from other contexts through "localization" and evaluation. However, this approach is insufficient to address the unique challenges of conflict zones. In 2024, 123 million people were forcibly displaced—the highest number on record—demonstrating the unprecedented scale of conflict-related harm. The article emphasizes that behavioral science must fundamentally reconsider its approach to conflict situations and cannot simply transfer theories and interventions developed in stable contexts to conflict areas. Future behavioral science research must develop new theories and methodologies specifically tailored to the unique characteristics of conflict-affected regions. This represents an urgent call for the field to bridge the significant gap between its existing knowledge base and the real-world needs of populations experiencing conflict.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
현재 약 20억 명의 사람들이 분쟁 지역에서 생활하고 있으나, 행동과학 분야는 대부분의 이론과 실험, 개입 방안을 안정적인 환경에서 개발해왔다는 것이 문제로 지적되고 있습니다. 행동과학자들이 분쟁 지역에서 연구를 수행할 때는 다른 지역에서 효과적이었던 방법을 "지역화"하여 평가하는 관례를 따르는 경향이 있습니다. 그러나 이러한 접근 방식은 충분하지 않다는 것이 주요 논점입니다. 2024년에는 사상 최고 수준인 1억 2,300만 명이 강제로 이주되었으며, 가자지구의 민간인 피해를 포함한 분쟁으로 인한 피해가 전례 없는 규모로 증가하고 있습니다. 이 기사는 행동과학이 분쟁 상황에 대한 이해를 근본적으로 재고해야 하며, 기존의 안정적 맥락에서 개발된 이론과 개입이 분쟁 지역에 직접 적용될 수 없음을 강조합니다. 향후 행동과학 연구는 분쟁 지역의 독특한 특성을 고려하여 새로운 이론과 방법론을 개발해야 한다는 시사점을 제공합니다.

articles.title: The ‘Busy’ Trap
articles.titleKo: '바쁨'의 함정
articles.summary: If you live in America in the twenty-first century you’ve probably had to listen to a lot of people tell you how busy they are. It’s become the default response when you ask anyone how they’re doing: “Busy!” “So busy.” “ Crazy busy.” It is, pretty obviously, a boast disguised as a complaint. And the stock response is a kind of congratulation: “That’s a good problem to have,” or “Better than the opposite.” Notice it isn’t generally people pulling back-to-back shifts in the I.C.U. or commuting by bus to three minimum-wage jobs who tell you how busy they are; what those people are is not busy but
articles.aiSummary:
In twenty-first century America, being "busy" has become the standard response to casual greetings, functioning as a humble-brag disguised as a complaint. People typically respond to such claims with congratulations like "That's a good problem to have" or "Better than the opposite." However, research suggests that those actually working the most demanding jobs—such as ICU nurses or individuals commuting to multiple minimum-wage positions—rarely boast about their busyness in the same way. This pattern indicates that claiming busyness functions as a social signal of status and self-worth rather than a genuine description of one's circumstances. The normalization of busy-bragging as cultural practice raises concerns about its impact on mental health and quality of life. The article critically examines how modern culture celebrates busyness while revealing the gap between actual labor demands and perceived importance. This observation challenges assumptions about work, status, and authentic well-being in contemporary society.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
현대 미국 사회에서 '바쁘다'는 표현이 일상적인 인사말이 되었는데, 이는 실제로는 불평을 가장한 자랑이라는 주장이 제기되고 있다. "너무 바빠", "미친 듯이 바빠"와 같은 표현에 대해 사람들은 "좋은 고민이네"라며 축하하는 식으로 응답하는 경향을 보인다. 흥미롭게도 실제로 가장 바쁜 사람들, 즉 의료 종사자들이나 최저임금 일자리 여러 개를 다니는 저소득층 사람들은 자신들이 얼마나 바쁜지 자주 언급하지 않는다는 점이 주목할 만하다. 이는 바쁨이 단순한 상태 설명이 아니라 사회적 지위와 자기 가치를 드러내는 신호로 기능하고 있음을 시사한다. 바쁨의 자랑이 문화적 규범으로 정착되면서 사람들의 정신건강과 삶의 질에 부정적인 영향을 미칠 수 있다. 이 기사는 현대 사회의 바쁨 문화를 비판적으로 분석하며, 실제 바쁨과 인식된 바쁨의 차이를 지적한다.

##
articles.aiSummaryEn:
In twenty-first century America, being "busy" has become the standard response to casual greetings, functioning as a humble-brag disguised as a complaint. People typically respond to such claims with congratulations like "That's a good problem to have" or "Better than the opposite." However, research suggests that those actually working the most demanding jobs—such as ICU nurses or individuals commuting to multiple minimum-wage positions—rarely boast about their busyness in the same way. This pattern indicates that claiming busyness functions as a social signal of status and self-worth rather than a genuine description of one's circumstances. The normalization of busy-bragging as cultural practice raises concerns about its impact on mental health and quality of life. The article critically examines how modern culture celebrates busyness while revealing the gap between actual labor demands and perceived importance. This observation challenges assumptions about work, status, and authentic well-being in contemporary society.

##
keyPoints: **바쁨의 역설 (Paradox of Busyness)** / People who boast about being busy are typically not those with genuinely demanding jobs, revealing that "busy" is a status signal rather than an accurate descriptor of actual workload.

**사회적 자랑의 메커니즘 (Social Signaling Mechanism)** / Claiming busyness functions as a humble-brag that garners social approval and congratulations, turning work intensity into cultural currency and social proof of importance.

**실제 바쁨과의 괴리 (Disconnect from Reality)** / Those with truly exhausting jobs (ICU workers, multiple minimum-wage workers) don't emphasize their busyness, suggesting the narrative is driven by perception rather than objective reality.

**문화적 영향과 건강의 우려 (Cultural Impact on Well-being)** / The normalization of busy-bragging as a cultural norm may contribute to stress, anxiety, and diminished life quality as people internalize the message that constant busyness equals worthiness and success.

articles.titleKo: 항공우주 공학자가 된다는 것
articles.summary: Landing the Perseverance rover on Mars, working in clean rooms to minimize the microbial bug count, and slogging through hundreds of engineering trade-offs with Swati Mohan, an aerospace engineer at NASA's Jet Propulsion Laboratory. In each episode of What It's Like to Be..., bestselling author Dan Heath speaks with someone about what it's like to walk in their (work) shoes. Behavioral Scientist serves as a d
articles.aiSummary:
This article introduces a podcast episode featuring Swati Mohan, an aerospace engineer at NASA's Jet Propulsion Laboratory, discussing her work experiences. The methodology employs an in-depth interview format from the "What It's Like to Be..." series hosted by bestselling author Dan Heath; specific participant numbers were not disclosed. Key content includes the process of landing the Perseverance rover on Mars, clean room operations to minimize microbial contamination, and navigating hundreds of engineering trade-offs. Particularly significant topics are the "seven minutes of terror" during Mars landing and evidence of past life on Mars. The significance of this interview lies in introducing the general public to scientists' actual work environments and decision-making processes, thereby enhancing understanding of space exploration. However, limitations include incomplete article text that prevents full analysis of specific findings and research constraints.

articles.title: ‘We Have Never Been Individuals’
articles.titleKo: 우리는 결코 개인이었던 적이 없다
articles.summary: Take a long, deep breath in. Now slowly let it out. Each time you inhale, you’re drawing in oxygen from the plants around you. Once in your lungs, oxygen navigates the bloodstream, where it gets exchanged for carbon dioxide. With each exhale, you fill the air with carbon dioxide, the very substance that all these plants need for photosynthesis. What we breathe out, plants breathe in. What plants breathe out, we breathe in. The air you breathe is the collective breath of other living beings. You are immersed in the world. And the world is immersed in you. Your body hosts a remarkable diversity
articles.aiSummary:
This article presents a philosophical perspective that humans are not independent individuals but constantly interact with their surrounding environment. Using respiration as an example, it explains the reciprocal cycle where humans obtain oxygen from plants and provide carbon dioxide to them. The methodology involves scientific analysis of material exchange processes between the body and environment. The key finding is that the human body hosts diverse microorganisms and environmental elements, demonstrating complete integration with the environment. This perspective encourages reconsideration of traditional understanding of individuality. However, as the discussion is primarily philosophical, additional presentation of quantified data or clinical evidence may be necessary.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
본 기사는 인간이 독립적인 개체가 아니라 주변 환경과 끊임없이 상호작용하는 존재라는 철학적 관점을 제시합니다. 호흡을 예시로 들어, 인간이 식물로부터 산소를 얻고 식물에게 이산화탄소를 제공하는 상호 순환 과정을 설명합니다. 연구 방법론적으로는 신체와 환경의 물질 교환 과정을 과학적으로 분석하는 방식을 채택합니다. 핵심 발견은 인간의 신체가 다양한 미생물과 환경 요소들을 호스팅하고 있으며, 이를 통해 환경과 완전히 통합되어 있다는 것입니다. 이 관점은 개별성에 대한 전통적 이해를 재검토하도록 유도합니다. 다만 철학적 논의 중심이므로, 구체적인 정량화된 데이터나 임상적 증거의 추가 제시가 필요할 수 있습니다.

##
articles.aiSummaryEn:
This article presents a philosophical perspective that humans are not independent individuals but constantly interact with their surrounding environment. Using respiration as an example, it explains the reciprocal cycle where humans obtain oxygen from plants and provide carbon dioxide to them. The methodology involves scientific analysis of material exchange processes between the body and environment. The key finding is that the human body hosts diverse microorganisms and environmental elements, demonstrating complete integration with the environment. This perspective encourages reconsideration of traditional understanding of individuality. However, as the discussion is primarily philosophical, additional presentation of quantified data or clinical evidence may be necessary.

##
keyPoints: **상호 호흡 시스템** / **Reciprocal Respiratory System**: 인간과 식물은 호흡을 통해 완벽한 상호 순환 관계를 형성하며, 개인이 호흡할 때마다 환경과의 물질 교환이 발생함.
**신체의 미생물 생태계** / **Microbial Ecosystem in Human Body**: 인간의 신체는 다양한 미생물을 호스팅하는 복합 생태계로 기능하며, 이는 완전히 독립적인 존재가 아님을 시사함.
**개별성의 재정의** / **Redefinition of Individuality**: "우리는 결코 개인이었던 적이 없다"는 명제는 개인과 환경의 경계가 불명확함을 강조하는 근본적 철학적 전환.
**환경과의 완전한 통합** / **Complete Integration with Environment**: 인간은 단순히 환경 속에 존재하는 것이 아니라 환경과 상호 침투하는 관계로, 세계가 개인 속에 침투하고 개인이 세계에 침투함.
